message:
refactor(time): extract wall_now() for internal reuse

Refactors the wall clock time calculation into a standalone function:

- Extract `wall_now()` from `Sleep::current_time()` closure
- Export as `pub(crate)` for internal use by other time-related modules
- Simplify `current_time()` to use `map_or_else(wall_now, getter)`

The function handles edge cases like clock regression (returns Time::ZERO
if current instant is before START_TIME) and uses lazy initialization
of the process start time via OnceLock.

This enables other modules like the timer driver to access wall clock
time without duplicating the start-time initialization logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
